files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info and get_ts_language functions
Added tsx extension mapping and tsx entry to supported_languages function

compile_belief: tsx language support has been successfully re-wired into the aptu-coder codebase. All four required code locations have been updated with proper feature-gating and correct constant/namespace references.
compile_belief_reason: The implementation follows the exact template specifications: (1) get_language_info uses LANGUAGE_TSX constant and typescript:: namespace, (2) get_ts_language arm maps 'tsx' to LANGUAGE_TSX, (3) EXTENSION_MAP registers 'tsx' extension, (4) supported_languages includes 'tsx'. All changes are properly feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = \"lang-tsx\")]. The shared pub mod typescript pattern is respected—no new module declaration was added.
